title: The Survivor Returns
description: Kelsier arrives at Lord Tresting's plantation in the Southern Dominance, killing the cruel nobleman—his first strike against the nobility since escaping the Pits.

title: Hidden Observer
description: Kelsier watches Camon's crew operate from the shadows, noting Vin's unconscious use of Allomancy—a street urchin with Mistborn powers.

title: Recruiting Vin
description: Kelsier rescues Vin from Camon's abuse and offers her a place in his crew, revealing the truth about her abilities as a Mistborn.

title: The Atium Heist
description: Kelsier breaks into Keep Venture's vault to steal atium, funding the rebellion while testing the defenses of the noble houses.

title: The Crew Assembles
description: At Clubs' carpentry shop, Kelsier gathers the full crew—Ham, Breeze, Dockson, Clubs, and now Vin—and reveals his plan to overthrow the Lord Ruler.

title: Teaching the Apprentice
description: Kelsier takes Vin to the city walls near Steel Gate for Allomancy training, teaching her to Push and Pull on metals while leaping between spires.

title: The Renoux Cover
description: Kelsier escorts Vin to Fellise and Lord Renoux's estate, establishing her cover identity as Lady Valette for the infiltration of noble society.

title: Planning the Revolution
description: Back in Luthadel, Kelsier meets with the crew at Clubs' shop to review the rebellion's progress. He takes Vin on a nighttime run through the city to continue her Allomancy training.

title: The Warehouse Rally
description: Kelsier preaches revolution to gathered skaa workers at a secret rally in the warehouse district, using his legend as the Survivor of Hathsin to inspire the rebellion.

title: Camon's Lair Massacre
description: Kelsier and the crew discover that the Ministry has slaughtered everyone at Camon's old lair in retaliation for the Canton of Finance scam, hardening their resolve against the Lord Ruler.

title: Planning at Fellise
description: Kelsier meets with Vin and Sazed at Lord Renoux's estate in Fellise, reviewing the intelligence from Vin's first ball and preparing the next phase of the plan.

title: Palace Reconnaissance
description: Kelsier and Vin scout Kredik Shaw at night, mapping the palace defenses and testing the Inquisitors' response capabilities.

title: Aftermath of Kredik Shaw
description: Kelsier meets with Dockson at Clubs' shop after the Kredik Shaw scouting mission. Dockson is furious about the risk of taking Vin to the Lord Ruler's palace.

title: Watching Over Vin
description: Kelsier stays at Clubs' shop watching over Vin as she recovers from her injuries sustained at Kredik Shaw, present when she finally wakes up.

title: Meeting at Renoux Estate
description: Kelsier travels to Fellise with Breeze, Yeden, and Dockson to meet with Lord Renoux at his estate, discussing the next phase of the rebellion.

title: House War Operations
description: Kelsier orchestrates attacks between noble houses, assassinating targets and planting evidence to fuel the House War that weakens the nobility.

title: The Rebel Army
description: Kelsier travels to the Arguois Caverns to inspect the growing rebel army hidden in the mountains, training soldiers who have never held weapons.

title: Disaster at Holstep
description: Kelsier pewter-drags to Holstep when the garrison discovers and massacres the rebel army. He arrives to find devastation and must flee south.

title: Picking Up the Pieces
description: Back at Clubs' Shop, Kelsier regroups after the Holstep disaster, refusing to abandon the revolution even as hope seems lost.

title: Destroying the Pits
description: Kelsier returns to the Pits of Hathsin—the site of his greatest suffering—and destroys the atium crystals, cutting off the Lord Ruler's most valuable resource.

title: The Survivor's Last Stand
description: Kelsier faces the Lord Ruler in Fountain Square, fighting an impossible battle. He dies with a smile, becoming a martyr whose death ignites the revolution.

title: Beyond Death
description: Through OreSeur the kandra wearing his bones, Kelsier's final plan unfolds—his death was the spark that set the revolution ablaze across Luthadel.

title: Beyond the Veil
description: Trapped in the Cognitive Realm after his death, Kelsier exists as a cognitive shadow near the Well of Ascension, watching Luthadel transform under Elend's rule.

title: Witnessing the Release
description: Kelsier watches helplessly from the Cognitive Realm as Vin takes the power at the Well of Ascension and releases it, freeing Ruin from its prison.

title: Cognitive Westward Journey
description: Existing as a Cognitive Shadow, Kelsier travels across the 'mist ocean' toward the western Burnlands to seek aid from the Ire fortress.

title: The Survivor Endures
description: In the Cognitive Realm, Kelsier works alongside Preservation's fading power, seeking any way to help the Physical Realm resist Ruin's growing influence.

title: The Warning at Fadrex
description: Kelsier arrives at the Cognitive reflection of Fadrex City, encountering Hoid and attempting to warn Vin of her Hemalurgic spike.

title: Holding Preservation
description: As Preservation's consciousness fades, Kelsier takes up the Shard's power—holding it imperfectly from the Cognitive Realm, buying time for the final act.

title: Passing the Torch
description: Vin takes Preservation's power from Kelsier to destroy Ruin. The Survivor releases the Shard, his role fulfilled—but he refuses to pass into the Beyond.

title: The Survivor Lives On
description: Even as Harmony remakes the world, Kelsier persists in the Cognitive Realm—the Survivor who refused to let even death stop him.
